name: INTRODUCTION LETTER comfort gardens Hotel Sweetwaters Nanyuki FOR THE YEAR 2025

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INTRODUCTION LETTER
texts.text: INTRODUCTION LETTER

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Warm greetings from Comfort Gardens Nanyuki.
texts.text: Warm greetings from Comfort Gardens Nanyuki.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Allow me to introduce COMFORT GARDENS HOTEL NANYUKI to you. It's an ideal setting for retreats, business meetings, team-building activities, conferences, and gatherings.
texts.text: Allow me to introduce COMFORT GARDENS HOTEL NANYUKI to you. It's an ideal setting for retreats, business meetings, team-building activities, conferences, and gatherings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The ambience at Comfort Gardens will inspire you to engage in activities that require a tranquil setting. This exclusive establishment offers personalized accommodations and services in a comfortable and welcoming setting, with a distinct character and charm.
texts.text: The ambience at Comfort Gardens will inspire you to engage in activities that require a tranquil setting. This exclusive establishment offers personalized accommodations and services in a comfortable and welcoming setting, with a distinct character and charm.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located on the plain of Mount Kenya, right at the Ol Pejeta Conservancy's entrance-Rongai gate. It's a
texts.text: Located on the plain of Mount Kenya, right at the Ol Pejeta Conservancy's entrance-Rongai gate. It's a

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 15km drive from town and 3 hours' drive from Nairobi city.
texts.text: 15km drive from town and 3 hours' drive from Nairobi city.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rooms are elegantly furnished and serviced, with a spacious lounge and balcony overlooking the OL Pejeta conservancy, complimentary tea and coffee, connected to DSTV and free Wi-Fi.
texts.text: All rooms are elegantly furnished and serviced, with a spacious lounge and balcony overlooking the OL Pejeta conservancy, complimentary tea and coffee, connected to DSTV and free Wi-Fi.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The cottages are fully equipped with a gas cooker, fridge, microwave, electric kettle, and a fire place. Our on-site restaurant offers a wide range of delectable cuisines from all over the world.
texts.text: The cottages are fully equipped with a gas cooker, fridge, microwave, electric kettle, and a fire place. Our on-site restaurant offers a wide range of delectable cuisines from all over the world.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Activities include;
texts.text: Activities include;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Game drive to Aberdare National Park, Ol Pejeta Conservancy, Solio ranch, Mount Kenya Orphanage, Ol Jogi and Samburu National Park.
texts.text: Game drive to Aberdare National Park, Ol Pejeta Conservancy, Solio ranch, Mount Kenya Orphanage, Ol Jogi and Samburu National Park.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Guided nature walks at Mau Mau caves
texts.text: Guided nature walks at Mau Mau caves

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Mountain climbing and trekking
texts.text: Mountain climbing and trekking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4 .swimming and kid's play ground
texts.text: 4 .swimming and kid's play ground

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Bird-watching
texts.text: Bird-watching

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2025 RACK RATES
texts.text: 2025 RACK RATES

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Off-peak: January-June 14, October and November
texts.text: Off-peak: January-June 14, October and November

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Peak season: June 15-September, Easter and public holidays.
texts.text: Peak season: June 15-September, Easter and public holidays.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our December rates will be shared in due course.
texts.text: Our December rates will be shared in due course.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All meals, except breakfast shall be on a la carte/buffet basis and at an extra cost of 2,000 per adult, per meal and 1,000 per kid, per meal.
texts.text: All meals, except breakfast shall be on a la carte/buffet basis and at an extra cost of 2,000 per adult, per meal and 1,000 per kid, per meal.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We extend a 10% commission to tour operators upon provision of your KRA Compliance and letter of incorporation.
texts.text: We extend a 10% commission to tour operators upon provision of your KRA Compliance and letter of incorporation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For more information, please visit our website on http://www.comfortgardens.com/
texts.text: For more information, please visit our website on http://www.comfortgardens.com/

texts.label: text
texts.orig: I look forward to your positive response
texts.text: I look forward to your positive response

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kind regards
texts.text: Kind regards
